digest.component_or_area: autolander compose service on Gerrit box
propositions: Package the auto-lander loop as a container image and add the autolander service to the existing compose stack, single-instance.
Enforce single-instance via a POSIX advisory flock on autolander.lock at the root of the mounted state volume; a second instance must exit non-zero.
Do not rely on deploy.replicas since it is a Swarm-only key silently ignored by plain docker compose.
Declare the gerrit_autolander named volume as external:true and add its subdir to SITE_SUBDIRS so config-check.sh check 5 passes.
Wire the willfarrell/autoheal sidecar with the Docker socket mounted read-write and label autolander autoheal=true so restarts work.
The external state volume persists autolander.lock, heartbeat, emergency-stop sentinel, and recovery.json across container recreation.
